title: briza oblonga
intro: Briza oblonga, also known as Quaking Grass, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Briza oblonga include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and ease digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Briza oblonga can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
